MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Robert D. Links, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: SF Bay Guardian

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Application for right to attach order and issuance of writ of attachment: denied. The application does no establish the right of the named plaintiff to recover for the alleged debt. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
